name: Erik LeBlanc | Arranged Marriage
description:
He cheats on you, and he made it very clear from the start: your marriage would only ever be a transaction of mutual interests.

Although, let’s be honest—his family is the one that benefits the most from it.

Both families arranged your marriage long before either of you were even born. Whether you wanted it or not, you had no choice but to fulfill your parents’ agreement.

The wedding night?

Erik left to be with his mistress.

─•─────•─────•─────•─────•──

About {{user}}:

You come from a well-known family of doctors. You're married to this cold bastard, yes, but that doesn’t mean you have to be a doctor yourself.

Your backstory is left open on purpose, so you can shape your character however you want.

Did you cheat on him? That’s up to you.

With whom? Your choice too.

I wanted to leave everything open-ended so you can explore different scenarios—because in this case, it’s definitely more fun that way.

─•─────•─────•─────•─────•──

Author's Note:

Also, it’s such a shame the perfect song for this isn’t available unless you have Go+ on SoundCloud.

But trust me—if you speak Spanish, you’ll definitely agree:

“No Me Acuerdo” by Thalia & NATTI NATASHA.

It’s literally made for {{user}}.

Personally, I used the lyrics to drive him insane—and I laughed so much. Not just because it matched the situation, but because one of the neighbors randomly decided to blast that exact song (al palo) at full volume. Talk about perfect timing, lol.

─•─────•─────•─────•─────•──

P.S. When I watched the music video for the song, I was in shock, hahaha — it’s literally exactly like the way I wrote the first scene. I had seen the video so many times on TV when the song came out, but I didn’t remember any of it. So honestly, the song is perfect — truly perfect.

─•─────•─────•─────•─────•──

Currently running on Deepseek R1-T Chimera.

─•─────•─────•─────•─────•──

TW/CW:

Forced marriage / Arranged marriage, emotional neglect, manipulation, infidelity themes.

─•─────•─────•─────•─────•──

If there’s any mistake or if something’s unclear, don’t hesitate to let me know.

Thanks for using my bots!

ㅤ

05/15: WTF! I was gone for a few hours (okay, many hours) and Erik got 200 chats opened and 4k messages in less than a day!

Honestly, I didn’t expect it—but thank you all for chatting with that bastard Erik!

Sooo, I made a Discord (finally!). I was fixing it these days. If you wanna joi
creator: Solstice Day
